screens.name: 01-calc-result
screens.title: CALC
screens.description: Framed RobCo keypad with a completed expression.

ops.text: WHEEL ROW  THUMB COLUMN  PRESS KEY

screens.name: 02-graph
screens.title: GRAPH
screens.description: Shared f(x) trace with zoom and pan controls.

ops.text: WHEEL SELECT  THUMB CHANGE  PRESS AUTO

screens.name: 03-calculus
screens.title: CALCULUS
screens.description: Numeric value, slope, area, roots, and extrema.

ops.text: WHEEL PICK   THUMB CHANGE   PUSH USE
WHEEL SELECT  THUMB CHANGE  PRESS ANS

screens.name: 05-converter
screens.title: CONVERT
screens.description: Engineering unit conversion with raw, scientific, and engineering formats.

ops.text: WHEEL SELECT  THUMB CHANGE  PRESS VALUE

screens.name: 06-constants
screens.title: CONSTANTS
screens.description: Filtered math, physics, unit, and material constants.

ops.text: WHEEL SELECT  THUMB CHANGE  PRESS INSERT

screens.name: 08-vacuum
screens.title: VAC
screens.description: Nitrogen vacuum telemetry with Pip-OS readouts.

ops.text: WHEEL PICK   THUMB DIAL   PUSH UNIT/OPEN
